summary: Comprehensive testing of Daily Wisdom widget and Thoth (11th teacher) features. All 26 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend features verified working correctly including Daily Wisdom on Dashboard, Thoth teacher card, detail page with 5 teachings and 8 quotes, and new Mysticism & Alchemy themes.
seed_data_creation: None required - teachers and themes are hardcoded in backend
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily Wisdom and Thoth features fully tested. Daily Wisdom widget displays on Dashboard with teacher name, quote, tradition, teaching title, and practice. Clicking navigates to /teachings. Thoth is 11th teacher with 5 teachings (Emerald Tablet, Seven Hermetic Principles, Book of Coming Forth by Day, Divine Mind, Spiritual Alchemy) and 8 quotes. Two new themes added: Mysticism & Alchemy, Sacred Transformation. Thoth appears in 4 themes total: consciousness, nature, mysticism, alchemy.

daily_wisdom_backend.GET /api/teachings/daily-wisdom: Returns daily wisdom with teacher_id, teacher_name, tradition, color, quote, teaching_title, teaching_excerpt, practice, date
daily_wisdom_backend.deterministic: Same result for same day (uses day-of-year as seed)

daily_wisdom_frontend.dashboard_widget: Daily Wisdom card displays on Dashboard with data-testid='dashboard-daily-wisdom'
daily_wisdom_frontend.content: Shows teacher name, quote, tradition, teaching title, practice

thoth_backend.GET /api/teachings/teacher/thoth: Returns full teacher with 5 teachings and 8 quotes

thoth_frontend.teacher_card: Thoth card displays in teachers list with data-testid='teacher-card-thoth'
thoth_frontend.detail_page: Shows bio, core principle, rotating quotes, 5 teachings
teachings: The Book of Coming Forth by Day

new_themes.mysticism: Mysticism & Alchemy theme with Thoth, Rumi, Yogananda, Krishna
new_themes.alchemy: Sacred Transformation theme with Thoth, Rumi, Buddha, Jesus
new_themes.frontend_display: Both themes display correctly in Themes view

backend_apis_tested: GET /api/teachings/daily-wisdom - 200 (returns daily wisdom with all required fields)
GET /api/teachings/themes - 200 (11 themes including mysticism and alchemy)
frontend_ui_tested: Dashboard Daily Wisdom widget displays with teacher name, quote, tradition, teaching, practice
Daily Wisdom card is clickable and navigates to /teachings
Teachings page shows 11 teacher cards including Thoth
Thoth card shows correct name, tradition, and 5 teachings count
Thoth detail page shows bio, core principle, rotating quotes, 5 teachings
Themes view shows 11 themes including Mysticism & Alchemy and Sacred Transformation
Thoth appears in Consciousness, Nature, Mysticism, and Alchemy themes
